body.title: cluster: ping pre-check before SSH in get_cluster_loads + cluster_status
body.result: cluster_status + get_cluster_loads: _ping() pre-check added. Live test: all 4 boxes PING ✓. Committed 0722f1de.
body.description: Add _ping(ip) function; use it in get_cluster_loads to distinguish truly-down boxes from load-saturated ones without burning a 10s SSH attempt. Show ping column in cluster_status output.
